title: Procedural Memory
concept: Retaining successful tool sequences, recipes, and action strategies for specific recurring task types.

exercises.explain: Semantic Memory is all about keeping facts, rules, and user preferences that help us understand the world.

cards.title: Introducing Procedural Memory
cards.body: Procedural Memory is about remembering how to do things, like riding a bike or baking cookies. It helps us perform actions automatically.

cards.title: What is Procedural Memory?
cards.body: Procedural Memory is a type of memory that stores our skills and actions. It lets us remember sequences of steps for tasks.

cards.title: Like a Recipe Book
cards.body: Think of Procedural Memory like a cookbook: it contains step-by-step instructions for making your favorite dishes, just like it guides you through actions.

cards.title: Real World Examples
cards.body: When you learn to play a video game, you remember the moves and strategies. This is your Procedural Memory at work!

cards.title: Myth: It's Only About Physical Skills
cards.body: Procedural Memory isn't just for physical actions. It also includes strategies and sequences for mental tasks, like solving puzzles.

cards.title: Memory Types Comparison
cards.body: Let's see how Procedural Memory works with other types of memory.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is an example of Procedural Memory?

options.text: Solving a math equation on paper

exercises.explain: Riding a bike is an action you perform automatically, showing how Procedural Memory works.

exercises.prompt: Procedural Memory is only about remembering facts. True or False?
exercises.explain: Procedural Memory is about skills and actions, not just facts.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: Procedural Memory helps us remember _____ and actions automatically.
exercises.sentence: Procedural Memory helps us remember skills and actions automatically.
exercises.explain: Skills are what Procedural Memory helps you retain so you can perform tasks smoothly.

exercises.prompt: Which statement is an AI-generated description of Procedural Memory?

options.text: It retains facts about the world.
It stores how to perform specific tasks.

exercises.explain: AI-generated descriptions accurately reflect that Procedural Memory is focused on task performance.

exercises.prompt: Which statement best describes the difference between Semantic Memory and Procedural Memory?

options.text: Semantic Memory stores facts, while Procedural Memory stores how to do things.
Both types store facts about the same things.
Procedural Memory is not important for actions.
Semantic Memory is about physical skills only.

exercises.explain: Semantic Memory is like a library of knowledge, while Procedural Memory helps us perform tasks without thinking, showing how both are essential to learning.
